body:
## Summary
- Forward OPENAI_BASE_URL and OPENAI_MODEL into the implement workflow
- Use the custom Codex relay command for session setup commands as well as the main acpx run
- Prevent implement runs from falling back to api.openai.com when a relay is configured

## Verification
- npm --prefix .agent test: 673/673 pass

Unblocks live smoke issue #10.
title: Use relay config for implement Codex sessions
